inputs.label: Current Parameter Value
inputs.businessContext: Measured current value of the parameter to be adjusted (e.g., pressure, speed, temperature).

inputs.label: Target Value
inputs.businessContext: Desired target value for the parameter after adjustment.

inputs.label: Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Current process efficiency affecting the parameter response (0-100).

inputs.label: Safety Margin
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor applied to the adjustment to prevent overshoot (typically >=100).

inputs.label: Adjustment Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Maximum permissible tweak percentage variation before issuing a warning.

formulas.withinTolerance: Math.abs(((targetValue - currentValue) / currentValue) * 100 * safetyFactor / efficiency) <= tolerance
